translations.### 找回密碼之簡訊驗證碼強度安全問題\n\n: ### Security Issues of SMS Verification Code Strength in Password Recovery
translations.#### 撰寫暴力破解 Python 腳本\n\n: #### Writing a Brute Force Python Script
translations.**這邊假設得到的檢查驗證碼請求是：**\n\n: **Here we assume the received verification code check request is:**
translations.*除密碼長度、複雜度不足之外，還有個問題是驗證碼未設嘗試上限、有效期限太長這兩個: *Besides insufficient password length and complexity, another issue is that the verification code has no attempt limit and its validity period is too long.*
translations.- Add more information verification for:
- Add more information verification for password reset (e.g., birthdate, security questions)

- Increase the verification code length (e.g., Apple’s 6-digit code) and increase the code complexity (if it does not affect the AutoFill feature).

- Invalidate the verification code after more than 3 failed attempts, and require the user to resend the code.

- Shorten the verification code validity period

- Lock the device after too many incorrect verification code attempts and add CAPTCHA verification.

- APP should implement SSL Pinning and encrypt/decrypt transmissions (to prevent sniffing)
translations.- [Revealing a Clever Website Vulnerabil:
- [Revealing a Clever Website Vulnerability Discovered Years Ago](../142244e5f07a/)

- [How to Create an Engaging Engineering CTF Competition](../729d7b6817a4/)

- [The app uses HTTPS for transmission, but data was still stolen.](../46410aaada00/)

- [Automate Routine Tasks with Python + Google Cloud Platform + Line Bot](../70a1409b149a/)
translations.> *Besides insufficient password length: > *Besides insufficient password length and complexity, another issue is that the verification code has no attempt limit and its validity period is too long.*
translations.> ⚠️Warning⚠️ This article is for demons: > ⚠️Warning⚠️ This article is for demonstrating the severity of this security issue only. Do not use it for malicious purposes.
translations.APP 多做 SSL Pining、傳輸加解密（防止嗅探）\n: APP should implement SSL Pinning and encrypt/decrypt transmissions (to prevent sniffing)
translations.APP 端因流程設計及方便使用者，多半會簡化重設密碼流程、有的 APP 甚至是通: On the APP side, due to process design and user convenience, the password reset flow is often simplified. Some apps even allow login through phone number verification alone; if there is no protection on the API side, this can lead to security vulnerabilities.
translations.[APP有用HTTPS傳輸，但資料還是被偷了。](../46410aaada00: [The app uses HTTPS for transmission, but data was still stolen.](../46410aaada00/)
translations.[使用 Python+Google Cloud Platform+Line Bo: [Automate Routine Tasks with Python + Google Cloud Platform + Line Bot](../70a1409b149a/)
translations.[如何打造一場有趣的工程CTF競賽](../729d7b6817a4/)\n: [How to Create an Engaging Engineering CTF Competition](../729d7b6817a4/)
translations.[揭露一個幾年前發現的巧妙網站漏洞](../142244e5f07a/)\n: [Revealing a Clever Website Vulnerability Discovered Years Ago](../142244e5f07a/)
translations.```\n破解所需嘗試時間：((10,000 * 0.1) / thread 數:
```
Time required to crack: ((10,000 * 0.1) / number of threads) seconds
```
translations.⚠️警告⚠️ 本文僅作展示此安全問題的嚴重性，請勿拿去做壞事。\n\n: ⚠️Warning⚠️ This article is for demonstrating the severity of this security issue only. Do not use it for malicious purposes.
translations.使用 Python 展示暴力破解的嚴重性\n\n: Demonstrating the Severity of Brute Force Attacks Using Python
translations.假設驗證請求需要 0.1 秒回應，10,000 個組合 = 10,000 次請求: Assuming each verification request takes 0.1 seconds to respond, 10,000 combinations = 10,000 requests.
translations.另一個找回密碼的方式是輸入綁定的手機號碼（多半用在 APP 服務），然後會寄出簡: Another way to reset the password is by entering the bound phone number (mostly used in APP services), then an SMS verification code is sent to the phone. After entering the code, the password can be reset. For convenience, most services use numeric-only codes. Additionally, since iOS ≥ 11 introduced the [Password AutoFill](../948ed34efa09/) feature, the keyboard automatically detects the verification code from the SMS and shows a prompt.
translations.因數字密碼的組合存在暴力破解的可能性，尤其是 4 位密碼；組合只有 0000~9: Because numeric passwords can be brute-forced, especially 4-digit codes; the combinations range only from 0000 to 9999, totaling 10,000 possibilities; using multiple threads and machines can distribute the brute-force attack.
translations.在使用網站、APP 服務的忘記密碼找回功能時；一般會有兩個選項，一是輸入帳號、E: When using the password recovery feature on websites or apps, there are usually two options. One is to enter your account or email, then a reset password page link containing a token is sent to your inbox. Clicking the link opens the page to reset the password. This method generally has no issues unless there are design flaws as mentioned in the [previous article](../142244e5f07a/).
translations.執行腳本後我們得到：\n\n: After running the script, we get:
translations.增加驗證碼長度（如 Apple 6 碼數字）、增加驗證碼複雜度（如果不影響 Au: Increase the verification code length (e.g., Apple’s 6-digit code) and increase the code complexity (if it does not affect the AutoFill feature).
translations.如果是前後端分離的網站服務也能使用 Chrome -> 檢查 -> Networ: For websites with front-end and back-end separation, you can also use Chrome -> Inspect -> Network -> to see what requests are sent after submitting the verification code.
translations.密碼重設增加更多資訊驗證（如：生日、安全問題）\n: Add more information verification for password reset (e.g., birthdate, security questions)
translations.將 `1743` 帶入重設密碼更改掉原始密碼或直接登入帳號。\n\n: Use `1743` to reset the password, change the original password, or directly log into the account.
translations.就算不開 thread 也只需要 16 多分種就能嘗試出正確的簡訊驗證碼。\n\: Even without using threads, it only takes a little over 16 minutes to try all possible SMS verification codes.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本文沒什麼資安技術含量，單純是日前在使用某平台網站時的突發奇想；想說順手測看看安: This article doesn't contain much cybersecurity technical content; it's simply a spontaneous idea that came up while using a certain platform's website recently. I decided to casually test its security and ended up discovering some issues.
translations.查找 [官方文件](https://developer.apple.com/do: Check the [official documentation](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/security/password_autofill/about_the_password_autofill_workflow){:target="_blank"}, Apple does not provide a format rule for automatic verification code filling; however, almost all services that support autofill use pure numbers. It is inferred that only numbers are allowed, and complex combinations mixing numbers and letters are not supported.
translations.綜合上述，此資安問題常見於 APP 端；因網頁服務多半都會在嘗試錯誤多次後加上圖: In summary, this security issue is common on the APP side because web services usually add CAPTCHA verification after multiple failed attempts or require answering security questions when requesting a password reset, increasing the difficulty of sending verification requests. Additionally, if the web service's verification is not separated between front-end and back-end, each verification request requires loading the entire webpage, lengthening the request response time.
translations.萬事都從嗅探開始，這部分可參考之前的文章「 [APP有用HTTPS傳輸，但資料還: Everything starts with sniffing. For this, you can refer to the previous articles "[APP uses HTTPS transmission, but data was still stolen.](../46410aaada00/)" and "[Using Python + Google Cloud Platform + Line Bot to automate routine tasks](../70a1409b149a/)". The first article explains the principle, and it is recommended to use [Proxyman](https://proxyman.io/){:target="_blank"} from the second article for sniffing.
translations.驗證碼嘗試錯誤大於 3 次後使其失效，需請使用者重新發送驗證碼\n: Invalidate the verification code after more than 3 failed attempts, and require the user to resend the code.
translations.驗證碼嘗試錯誤過多次鎖定裝置、增加圖形驗證碼\n: Lock the device after too many incorrect verification code attempts and add CAPTCHA verification.
translations.驗證碼有效時限縮短\n: Shorten the verification code validity period
